user.title: AI Camera Centre
user.description: Global settings — you can change these later and add cameras from the integration's Configure button.

add_camera.title: Add camera
add_camera.description: The motion sensor triggers the AI analysis automatically. The scene context is added to the AI prompt — describe what the camera sees, and say explicitly whether a gate is visible.

data.name: Camera name
data.motion_entity: Motion sensor (optional — leave blank to trigger via the ai_camera_centre.analyze service)
